Summary: The Original Grey PlayStation is Sony's launch model that introduced the PlayStation brand to the world. Featuring its iconic light grey design, it established Sony as a major force in the video game industry and became one of the most influential consoles ever released.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation Midnight Blue 10 Million Model
Summary: The Midnight Blue '10 Million Model' commemorated the sale of ten million PlayStation consoles worldwide. Finished in a striking dark blue colour, it is one of the most sought-after official PlayStation collector's editions.

The Video CD PlayStation is a unique retail model released exclusively for Southeast Asia. It featured integrated Video CD playback, allowing the console to function as both a gaming system and a VCD player.
The PS one is Sony's compact redesign of the original PlayStation. It features a significantly smaller footprint while maintaining full compatibility with original PlayStation games and accessories.

Edition Name: PS one Combo Pack with LCD Screen
Summary: The PS one Combo Pack bundled Sony's official 5-inch LCD Screen with the compact PS one console. The combination transformed the home console into a highly portable gaming system and remains one of the most recognisable official PlayStation bundles.
